# Robots.txt for BreederHQ Marketing Website
User-agent: *
Allow: /

# Sitemap (auto-generated by @astrojs/sitemap at build time)
Sitemap: https://breederhq.com/sitemap-index.xml

# Common crawlers
User-agent: Googlebot
Allow: /

User-agent: Bingbot
Allow: /

User-agent: Slurp
Allow: /

User-agent: DuckDuckBot
Allow: /

# Block AI training crawlers (optional - uncomment if desired)
# User-agent: GPTBot
# Disallow: /
#
# User-agent: ChatGPT-User
# Disallow: /
#
# User-agent: CCBot
# Disallow: /
#
# User-agent: anthropic-ai
# Disallow: /
#
# User-agent: Claude-Web
# Disallow: /

# Note: Crawl-delay removed — Google/Bing ignore it and it can throttle
# lesser crawlers unnecessarily. Use Google Search Console to control crawl rate.
